texto: The bell tolls with a painful note afarWhen man drops in the dreadful jaws of deathBut human beasts watch death with mouth ajarWhile lifeless church bell feels the pangs of death
autor: Manuel Newton-Management Consultant Poet MA M.Com LLB ICWA FIBAM FIMM etc
explicacao: Citação de Manuel Newton-Management Consultant Poet MA M.Com LLB ICWA FIBAM FIMM etc sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The bell tolls with a painful note afarWhen man drops in the dreadful jaws of deathBut human beas…” articula reflexao, life-and-death, life-philosophy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e life-philosophy.
